details.address: 138 W Mountain St, Kings Mountain, NC 28086

raw_data.address: 138 W Mountain St, Kings Mountain, NC 28086
raw_data.name: Imperial Mercantile, Inc.
raw_data.subtypes: General store, Cider bar, Clothing store, Coffee shop, Gift shop, Wine bar

reviews_data.review_text: Delicious coffee
Drinks are super good and super nice people

Highly recommend! The coffee is the best I’ve had in a long time. Julian was incredibly helpful, I don’t drink caffeine, and when I asked about the special Cold Potato, which has cold brew, he immediately offered to make a decaf variation. My friend’s drinks were also delicious! The store has a great selection of items to browse, and I even bought a candle that is making my house smell amazing right now. They also have wine and beer in the back. This is a cool spot with great coffee, unique items, and incredibly friendly staff

Loved the store, but I want to rant about my coffee
Every coffee shop I go to doesn’t mix the syrup with the espresso so it’ll just pool at the bottom, of the like six I’ve tried regularly this is the only one to do so. They also generally have high quality coffee and a pleasant barista that made my coffee today 🙂👍
Has such a great vibe and so many great products plus Julian makes a great coffee to enjoy while youre looking around.
Not open at 330
Great coffee, and love the ambiance!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting with us today hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great coffee shop in back! Nice hiking, outdoor clothing and some candy. They have good wine as well... including award winning local favorite Buffalo Baker Winery. Limited pant sizes but found a few shirts. Street parking. Great restaurant across the street.
My latte tasted like warm milk. Nice people and service but coffee was very forgettable.
We love the Mercantile. So quaint and cozy. The coffee and teas are absolutely amazing! We buy the teas to make at home often.
Cool store with an upscale general-store feel. Fun place to browse. We ended up purchasing some loose tea and cardamom sugar and enjoyed a cup of tea at the coffee/tea/wine bar.
Best place ever, such good coffee with insane coffee art. 10/10 hidden gem! 100% worth stopping by!
What a surprise in the heart of kings mtn. Great array of products, clothing house goods and great coffee bar.

What an awesome find! Didn’t expect to find such a great gift shop in King’s Mtn. Lovely and helpful staff, terrific variety of merch and the coffee in the back… yes, ma’am! My husband bought things and not once did he ask me if I was “ready to go.”

If I hadn’t said it yet this place is the best coffee in Kings Mountain with the most friendly owner With an outstanding personality if you have not gone and you’re in the area, you should especially if you enjoy coffee teas and other Items Ranging from different hoodies and shirts to different teas and spices, different knickknacks and goodies even for your dog
BOMB coffee. And Julian (I believe that was his name) SUPER friendly and kind. Thinking of moving to the area and he was just so helpful 💘💯
Very welcoming ambience with very cool stuff available for purchase. Best coffee shop around here

Just love this local business! Julian is the best barista and the coffee is fabulous. A great variety of goods with lots of surprises. A place where one feels known and welcome. One of my favorite places uptown! Our family frequents here regularly.
Guy that runs this place is always nice here, coffee yummy 😋
Best Coffee!! Hands Down
This is a really nice place! They make really good coffee inside, and the staff are all very friendly. Tons of interesting things sold here, especially if you enjoy vintage. :)
Very good service and delicious coffee.
Fun store. Coffees were very good.
The best coffee around Gastonia!!!
Excellent drinks, service and environment! Would absolutely recommend.
Such a beautiful place ! Julian was so nice ! Coffee was delicious and love the store ! We will be back every time we come down this way for our fishing days .

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Absolutely loved this shop! The blueberry matcha was perfectly balanced, and the teddy graham latte was smooth and rich. The atmosphere was cozy, and the service was warm and welcoming. Thanks Julian! I’ll definitely be back next time I’m in town! Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting with us!!!
reviews_data.review_text:
This was such an unexpected gem. We came here after having lunch across the street and this place is filled with a little bit of everything! Clothes, games, candy, cookware, candles, spices, teas, etc. It's very cute, and very quaint.

Me and The Husband were greeted as we walked in and it was a very cozy vibe. This is what I'd imagine walking into a general store in Mayberry with Andy Griffith around the corner would feel like 🤭

There's a coffee shop in the back and Julian was great! I got a small blueberry matcha and it did not disappoint! Highly recommend it! And it seems like they have seasonal drinks that change regularly so I'm looking forward to going back and trying out more of them.

First time stopping in since the shop opened downtown.  Only stopped in for coffee today, but loved the friendly atmosphere and service!  Everything tasted delicious and Julian was so patient and personable with my two toddlers, even involving them in the process.
Super cool experience!  Highly recommend!
Very nice environment for studying, lots of cool stuff for sale and really great coffee at Gold Medusa :)
Very nice place in town! For coffee enthusiasts, you will not be disappointed. Fresh roasted beans available for purchase. Check them out. Julian is a cool dude!
Tried this place for coffee a few days ago and I absolutely loved the whole experience staff is amazing coffee is amazing. I will definitely be here a lot!
Great coffee shop! Wish I found this place sooner! Julien’s latte art is impressive. Big fan of their lavender London fog.
The best latte I’ve ever had. Perfect get together ambiance.
Quaint place, great service. And lots of candy options! Love it :D

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting with us today!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a gem. Interesting and unique items for sale. Teas, cookware, clothing and great gift ideas. Coffee shop in back is also great! Very friendly and helpful staff.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting with us today!  We agree...Julian is awesome!!
reviews_data.review_text: Julian makes THE BEST coffee I’ve ever had! Wonderful experience every time 🤣
The space is quaint, cozy and filled with beautiful things.  I could linger here all afternoon.  Must try the blueberry matcha latte!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting us today!
reviews_data.review_text: Love this place! Julian is the sweetest!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting with us today. Hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Love Love Love! Best part about Kings Mountain aside from the outdoor aspect. The staff and owners are very knowledgeable and kind. They have different and cool items.

Absolutely delightful coffee bar tucked in the back of a “general store” full of unique offerings.  We picked up a couple of fun coasters, had an espresso and a chai latte, and enjoyed the atmosphere!  We will definitely return.
Best place.  Would leave more stars but Google won't let me.  Everyone is just so friendly.  And if you go for coffee or tea it's always spot on.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting with us!!
reviews_data.review_text: A great store, with unique merchandise and ideas for gifts! The staff was super friendly and helpful. I LOVE this store.
Great products! Greater people!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Great little unique store in Kings Mountain. They have unique items, great gift ideas and the coffee bar in the back is a special treat.
Neat store. Lots of great things
A lovely atmosphere, the coffee is great , the staff is so welcoming . We always find the nearest unique gifts there .
Wonderful and fun store. They encourage browsing and they do a great job of staging the merchandise which encourages you to look in every nook and cranny.
10/10 would recommend! The coffee is phenomenal. Julian is always brewing up something delicious! I love the relaxed atmosphere.

Best London Fog ever. 10/10 so amazing. The barista was so great. It healed my sickness, my crops are thriving. So great.
Also great atmosphere to talk about D&D.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for supporting local!!!
reviews_data.review_text: What a great place to shop ! From beautiful clothes , wine , home decor ! You can’t see everything !!  And coffee while you shop !

Julian is the best. He makes EXCELLENT coffee and is great with customers. He always makes you feel included. This is a great example of what small businesses in down town Kings Mountain bring to our area!!! Go check him out at Imperial Mercantile & Outfitters (Gold Medusa Coffee Co.)
One the best coffee shops I’ve been to. Such a nice atmosphere. Julian was so welcoming and made  my pumpkin spice latte perfect.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing place with great staff! Love everything from coffee to antiques, love it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting the Imperial!
reviews_data.review_text: Top notch customer service we stopped and got a wicked delicious coffee we had Julian make us one of his master concoctions and it was absolutely delicious. Julian give us all kinds of information and will be stopping by the Sister store. I highly recommend the stop super cute store and make sure you stop by and grab a coffee from Julian.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for visiting today!
reviews_data.review_text: Such an amazing store and staff! Latte was right on point too! Love this little gem in Kings Mountain

reviews_data.owner_answer: Welcome to the Imperial family, we look forward to seeing you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text:
Fantastic people!!!! We had such a nice visit in this store, we didn't want to leave. I will be back to see my new friends.
It is well worth the stop, go see them for yourself, you will be glad you did.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for visiting and we are glad you like the coffee!
reviews_data.review_text: My visit to this establishment was exceptional. The atmosphere was cozy, welcoming, and professional. The coffee made by Julian (I hope I am spelling his name correctly) was phenomenal. The store had a variety of items to browse through. I would visit this establishment again and recommend it to a friend visiting the Kings Mountain area.
Fabulous spot. Gorgeous design. Delicious coffee! You must visit.

The Mercantile in Kings Mountain is stunning. It has that gorgeous, warm historical vibe, and a fantastic collection of different items for you to purchase. Definitely go down and support our local businesses!!! Linda Ford Coldwell Banker Mountain View
My wife and I spent about an hour roaming through all the really cool stuff. Great shopping experience!
I have purchased 2 beautiful dresses and other articles. Very pleased with all. Owner and employees are amazing. I highly recommend Imperial Mercantile Inc.
Great little shop. Fun clothes and very friendly atmosphere. Now you can grab a. Glass of wine while you shop!

Do not buy clothes here! I bought a pair of $60 jeans that immediately lost all of its dye in the first wash. I first requested a call back from the owner, who is very difficult to reach. They did NOTHING to remedy the situation (gift card, exchange, return) given the fact they have faulty clothes. The most the owner did was offer to call the retailer where they bought the jeans from, but has not contacted me back in weeks.

Bad clothes, bad business practice, and bad owner!
Great place! Julian & all the other staff are very friendly & helpful! Love the lavender Matcha
Very cool place

Julian, the coffee owner, is extremely receptive to people's tastes and knowledgeable of his craft. Always a good pick me up visiting with him. The shop is cool to browse around to find what knew trinkets they've picked up.
Best Flat White EVER!!!! Can’t wait to come back!!!
Great store with great products!
Such a great little store with very unique items, favorite part is Julian and his coffee creations. I’m here as often as my wife allows! Definitely recommend a stop by.
We LOVE coming in here for the coffee and the good vibes the store gives! Julian and Katie are the best company 🖤
This store is so cozy! As soon as you walk in it smells so good! I saw so many teas and spices I want to try. I settled on a homemade soap bar and a latte. Will definitely be back!
Super nice staff! Cute store! Had fun stopping here on my way back to Charlotte, NC! 10/10 would recommend! Prices aren’t too crazy either.
Excellent customer service and unique gifts, clothing and "for the home" items.  I love having a sweet place to shop and get coffee in my downtown hometown.

Love the atmosphere! Lots of great things to buy and I love that it’s products from locals! Love the R&B Apiary honey, rock candy, and absolutely love the Gold Medusa coffee! I get the Iced Carmel Macchiato and it’s amazing, 1000x better than Starbucks! The quality is top tier, I absolutely love that it’s from Columbia and not some distribution factory producing 5 million bags a day. Julian and his family’s coffee are pretty amazing! 10/10 🙌🏻
Wonderful place, best coffee!!! Thanks Julian you are the best!
An outstanding gift store with loads of local goods like pottery and hot sauce.

A very nice find during my adventure to Kings Mountain. Very large open area store with a coffee bar in the back. Barista was friendly and professional. Good quality coffee with a relaxing vibe. Store offer plenty to look at with wide arrange of products and clothing. A great way to waste the hours away on a sleepy Sunday. There are some local made goodies in the back aswell as bottled drinks.

This is such a fun place to shop for yourself, family and friends.  The merchandise is of good quality and the staff are friendly and very helpful.  The coffee shop in the store is an absolute treasure with incredibly delicious coffee.  It's a must when your are in town.

Native of kings mountain and this was our first time visiting! It was a wonderful atmosphere with plenty of choices to choose from! Definitely worth the trip. Staff is extremely friendly and give off a hometown vibe. Gold Medusa coffee within the store was absolutely amazing. My wife and I recommend the Nutella latte.

I stopped by after school today. The Mercantile is a really awesome place to shop and get some coffee. Stop by and say Hayden sent you. If you are looking for the BEST coffee in town that beats anywhere else, stop by and ask for Julian. Don’t forget to tell him Hayden sent you. He made me a iced caramel macchiato and I will say that this man has a very special gift. He was very friendly and extremely helpful on what to choose. Wonderful person Mr. Julian is. Now Miss Kate…or Kay(sorry 🤗) was very sweet. She was helping my mom while I was getting distracted by all the wonderful items in the store…but then I smelled that wonderful smell of heaven on a cloud with pure bliss aroma of fresh coffee🤤🤤🤤. I was so distracted that I purchased a pair of tall shark socks and taco socks. Make sure you stop by and support one of the best local businesses her in Kings Mountain. They have the perfect gift for anyone or even yourself. I guarantee you won’t walk away empty handed. Bring your family and bring your friends. The more hands to help with shopping bags and the top notch coffee. You guys are the BEST. Thank You so much…Hayden and Carrie🛍🛍🛍☕️☕️☕️
Tad bit over priced things. But still a nice store
Friendly workers, great merchandise,
by far the best coffee KM has ever had & one of the best coffees I’ve ever had!! Julian is so friendly and always makes the best latte!
Great products and professional staff!
This is the neatest store! Great variety and wonderful service!
Great place to shop for unique gifts and things for your home! Start your holiday shopping early and beat the crowds!  You’ll be glad you did!
Great little place. First time here and my wife loves it already! A+
LOVE Imperial Mercantile!  Always find something unique and perfect for the occasion.  Great prices and super friendly folks!
WOW! What a great place. If you live or are on vacation you need to stop here. It's in a great area with Home town shops..

Always the best!   I have bought many gifts and personal items at The Imperial Mercantile.  Whether food items, or clothing or home goods……Always great style and outstanding quality.  You won’t be disappointed.  Go shopping today!
After living in Murrells Inlet the last 20 years it's nice to come home to small town life.  Imperial is a reminder of where we came from.  Great store for unique gifts.
I bought 16 Christmas presents at Imperial Mercantile. The unique nature of the items reflecting regional vendors were a huge hit. Customer service was the best.
Great Place!
A variety of items available that can’t be found in other locations. I always receive personalized, friendly service. A beautiful addition to our town!
Excellent selection of great gift ideas locally sourced.

What a Wonderful addition to Kings Mountain NC. This General store has just a bit of everything! I have filled my Christmas stockings with the cutest pocket puzzles, hand made soaps, organic teas, candy 🍬, candles, hats and more. They support local business and sell local artisan items along with pottery, clothing from trackside Trader, ice cream from Scoops, glassware, puzzles and so much more! It's the perfect place to run for any gift 🎁 you may need. Owners are super fun and friendly! Don't miss out on this new local gem ✨️ 💛 💕 👌
Very cute and quaint store. Has a variety of neat merchandise.

He made me a iced caramel macchiato and I will say that this man has a very special gift. He was very friendly and extremely helpful on what to choose. Wonderful person Mr. Julian is. Now Miss Kate…or Kay(sorry 🤗) was very sweet. She was helping my mom while I was getting distracted by all the wonderful items in the store…but then I smelled that wonderful smell of heaven on a cloud with pure bliss aroma of fresh coffee🤤🤤🤤. I was so distracted that I purchased a pair of tall shark socks and taco socks. Make sure you stop by and support one of the best local businesses her in Kings Mountain. They have the perfect gift for anyone or even yourself. I guarantee you won’t walk away empty handed. Bring your family and bring your friends. The more hands to help with shopping bags and the top notch coffee. You guys are the BEST. Thank You so much…Hayden and Carrie🛍🛍🛍☕️☕️☕️
Tad bit over priced things. But still a nice store
Friendly workers, great merchandise,
by far the best coffee KM has ever had & one of the best coffees I’ve ever had!! Julian is so friendly and always makes the best latte!
Great products and professional staff!
This is the neatest store! Great variety and wonderful service!
Great place to shop for unique gifts and things for your home! Start your holiday shopping early and beat the crowds!  You’ll be glad you did!
Great little place. First time here and my wife loves it already! A+
LOVE Imperial Mercantile!  Always find something unique and perfect for the occasion.  Great prices and super friendly folks!
WOW! What a great place. If you live or are on vacation you need to stop here. It's in a great area with Home town shops..

Always the best!   I have bought many gifts and personal items at The Imperial Mercantile.  Whether food items, or clothing or home goods……Always great style and outstanding quality.  You won’t be disappointed.  Go shopping today!
After living in Murrells Inlet the last 20 years it's nice to come home to small town life.  Imperial is a reminder of where we came from.  Great store for unique gifts.
I bought 16 Christmas presents at Imperial Mercantile. The unique nature of the items reflecting regional vendors were a huge hit. Customer service was the best.
Great Place!
A variety of items available that can’t be found in other locations. I always receive personalized, friendly service. A beautiful addition to our town!
Excellent selection of great gift ideas locally sourced.

What a Wonderful addition to Kings Mountain NC. This General store has just a bit of everything! I have filled my Christmas stockings with the cutest pocket puzzles, hand made soaps, organic teas, candy 🍬, candles, hats and more. They support local business and sell local artisan items along with pottery, clothing from trackside Trader, ice cream from Scoops, glassware, puzzles and so much more! It's the perfect place to run for any gift 🎁 you may need. Owners are super fun and friendly! Don't miss out on this new local gem ✨️ 💛 💕 👌
Very cute and quaint store. Has a variety of neat merchandise.
